href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a>, just after this unit is selected to shoot, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one enemy unit (excluding <span class="kwb">MONSTERS</span> and <span class="kwb">VEHICLES</span>). Until the end of the phase, attacks made by models in this unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and, after resolving those attacks, if one or more of those attacks hit that enemy unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is assailed (this simply labels that unit for the purposes of this ability and some Enhancements and Stratagems). If that unit is already assailed, until the start of your next Shooting phase, it is also pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Charging-with-a-Unit">Charge rolls</a> made for it.</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00083"><p>The <span class="kwb">HERNKYN</span> keyword is used in the following Leagues of Votann datasheets:</p><span class="contents"><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Dedicated Transports</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Carrier" class="contentColor">Kapricus Carrier</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Other</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Hernkyn-Pioneers" class="contentColor">Hernkyn Pioneers</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO LVVS" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Hernkyn-Yaegirs" class="contentColor">Hernkyn Yaegirs</a></div><div style="clear:both"></div><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Defenders" class="contentColor">Kapricus Defenders</a></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div></span></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00084"><div class=" str10Wrap BreakInsideAvoid str10ColorYour"><div class="str10Name">RANGER TACTICS</div>

class="kwb kwbo">MOUNTED</span></a> unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.<br><br><span class="str10ColorEnemy"><b>EFFECT:</b></span> Until the end of the phase, your unit has the <span class="tooltip00085" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00085"><span class="tt kwbu">Stealth</span></span> ability and each time a ranged attack class="tt kwbu">Cover</span></span> against that attack.</div>

Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">The weighing of costs in Kin lives and materiel expended against prospective material benefits is an instinct amongst kinhost commanders. <p class="ShowFluff legend2">Certain weapons are the bane of a particular foe.</p>Weapons with <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[ANTI-KEYWORD X+]</span> in their profile are known as Anti weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon against a target with the keyword after the word ‘Anti-’, an unmodified <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#2.-Wound-Roll">Wound roll</a> of ‘x+’ scores a <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#2.-Wound-Roll">Critical Wound</a>.<br><br><div class="redExample"><b>Example:</b> An attack made with an <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[ANTI-VEHICLE 4+]</span> weapon will score a Critical Wound against – and so successfully wound – a <span class="kwb">VEHICLE</span> unit on an unmodified Wound roll of 4+, while an attack made with an <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[ANTI-PSYKER 2+]</span> weapon will score a Critical Wound against – and so successfully wound – a <span class="kwb">PSYKER</span> unit on an unmodified Wound roll of 2+.</div><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li><span class="kwb2 bluefont">[ANTI-KEYWORD X+]</span>: An unmodified Wound roll of ‘x+’ against a target with the matching keyword scores a Critical Wound.</li></ul></div>

move</a> of up to 3" and can then attempt to <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/boarding-action-rules/#Open-Hatchways">operate a Hatchway</a>.</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00118"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>Signature Restoration</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-4"><div masterful and efficient work of this senior Brôkhyr is renowned and admired amongst the leagues.</p><p><a class="kwbOne" Each time a friendly <span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVLV"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVDS"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span using the bearer’s Forgewrought Expertise ability, that model regains 1 additional lost wound.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00119"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>Calculated Tenacity</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-5"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></span><span>15 pts</span></li></ul><div class="detachName">Hearthfyre Arsenal Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">Like any other resource, resolve and bloody-mindedness can be applied in force when and where needed by those with the will to do so.</p><p><a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Brôkhyr-Iron-master"><span class="kwb kwbo">IRON-MASTER</span></a> or <a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Memnyr-Strategist"><span class="kwb kwbo">MEMNYR</span> <span class="kwb kwbo">STRATEGIST</span></a> model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00120"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>Fârstrydr Node</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-5"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></span><span>20 pts</span></li></ul><div class="detachName">Hearthfyre Arsenal Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">An evolutionary stride in teleportation technology, this experimental device shields its wearer and their companions in a bubble of esoteric force. It is.so strong that they can endure brief teleportation plunges through the Warp to strike at the most opportune time.</p><p><a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Brôkhyr-Iron-master"><span class="kwb kwbo">IRON-MASTER</span></a> or <a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Memnyr-Strategist"><span class="kwb kwbo">MEMNYR</span> <span class="kwb kwbo">STRATEGIST</span></a> model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the <span class="tooltip00042" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00042"><span class="tt kwbu">Deep</span> <span class="tt kwbu">Strike</span></span> ability.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00121"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>Graviton Vault</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-5"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></span><span>5 pts</span></li></ul><div class="detachName">Hearthfyre Arsenal Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">This rune-scribed device holds a cache of forgewrought particles. Funnelled through an Iron-master’s graviton arsenal, they mutate and cause anarchic fluxes in neuroelectrical impulses of the largest targets.</p><p><a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Brôkhyr-Iron-master"><span class="kwb kwbo">IRON-MASTER</span></a> model only. In your <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a>, after the bearer has shot, and in the <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#FIGHT-PHASE">Fight phase</a>, after the bearer has fought, select one enemy <span class="kwb">MONSTER</span> or <span class="kwb">VEHICLE</span> unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the <span class="tooltip00020" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00020"><span class="tt kwbu">Hit</span> <span class="tt kwbu">roll</span></span>.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00122"><div class="tooltip_header">Lethal Hits</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Lethal-Hits"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
<p class="ShowFluff legend2">Some weapons can inflict fatal injuries on any foe, no matter their resilience.</p>Weapons with <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[LETHAL HITS]</span> in their profile are known as Lethal Hits weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, a <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#1.-Hit-Roll">Critical Hit</a> automatically wounds the target.
</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00123"><div class="tooltip_header">Psychic Weapons and Abilities</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Psychic-Weapons-and-Abilities"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
Some weapons and abilities can only be used by <span class="kwb">PSYKERS</span>. Such weapons and abilities are tagged with the word ‘Psychic’. If a Psychic weapon or ability causes any unit to suffer one or more wounds, each of those wounds is considered to have been inflicted by a Psychic Attack.
</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00124"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="EnhancementsPts EnhancementsPtsBottom">Masterful Construction<a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-7"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div class="detachName">Void Salvagers Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">The weapons utilised by the Kin are wrought by expert craftsmen and are as versatile as they are deadly.</p><p>Each time the bearer is selected to shoot or fight, you can select one of the following weapon abilities: <span class="kwb2 bluefont"><span class="tooltip00004" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00004"><span class="tt kwbu">[DEVASTATING</span> <span class="tt kwbu">WOUNDS]</span></span></span>; <span class="kwb2 bluefont"><span class="tooltip00122" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00122"><span class="tt kwbu">[LETHAL</span> <span class="tt kwbu">HITS]</span></span></span>; <span class="kwb2 bluefont"><span class="tooltip00012" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00012"><span class="tt kwbu">[SUSTAINED</span> <span class="tt kwbu">HITS</span> <span class="tt kwbu">1]</span></span></span>. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by the bearer (excluding <span class="tooltip00123" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00123"><span class="tt kwbu">Psychic</span> <span class="tt kwbu">weapons</span></span>) have that ability.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00125"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="EnhancementsPts EnhancementsPtsBottom">Obsessive Drive<a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-7"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div class="detachName">Void Salvagers Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">The bearer seeks a specific item that lies in the hands of the foe and they will not rest until it has been secured. Those foes foolish enough to block the path are targeted for priority destruction.</p><p>At the start of the first <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#The-Battle-Round">battle round</a>, select one <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/boarding-action-rules/#Objective-Markers">objective marker</a>. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time a <span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVLV"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVNO"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVPP"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVDS"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVBO"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVHA"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="" class="snFl LVHE"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVMO"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVVS"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVHS"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span> unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, each enemy unit within range of that objective marker is considered to have 1 additional Judgement token while resolving those attacks.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00126"><div class="tooltip_header">Pistol</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Pistol"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
<p class="ShowFluff legend2">Pistols can be wielded even at point-blank range.</p>Weapons with <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[PISTOL]</span> in their profile are known as Pistols. If a unit contains any models equipped with Pistols, that unit is eligible to shoot in its controlling player’s <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a> even while it is within <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Engagement-Range">Engagement Range</a> of one or more enemy units. When such a unit is selected to shoot, it can only resolve attacks using its Pistols and can only target one of the enemy units it is within Engagement Range of. In such circumstances, a Pistol can target an enemy unit even if other friendly units are within Engagement Range of the same enemy unit.<br><br>If a model is equipped with one or more Pistols, unless it is a <span class="kwb">MONSTER</span> or <span class="kwb">VEHICLE</span> model, it can either shoot with its Pistols or with all of its other ranged weapons. Declare whether such a model will shoot with its Pistols or its other ranged weapons before selecting targets.<br><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li>Can be shot even if the bearer’s unit is within Engagement Range of enemy units, but must target one of those enemy units.</li><li>Cannot be shot alongside any other non-Pistol weapon (except by a <span class="kwb">MONSTER</span> or <span class="kwb">VEHICLE</span>).</li></ul></div>

Each time a model with this ability suffers damage and so would lose a wound (including wounds lost due to <span class="tooltip00005" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00005"><span class="tt kwbu">mortal</span> <span class="tt kwbu">wounds</span></span>), roll one D6: if the result is greater than or equal to the number denoted by ‘x’, that wound is ignored and is not lost. If a model has more than one Feel No Pain ability, you can only use one of those abilities each time that model suffers damage and so would lose a wound.<br><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li><b>Feel No Pain x+:</b> Each time this model would lose a wound, roll one D6: if the result equals or exceeds ‘x’, that wound is not lost.</li></ul></div></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00138">Alternative models by <b>Artel W</b>:<br><br><div class="center"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid altModelsA"><a href="https://artelw.com/Gloinsson-p473462941?aff=3" rel="nofollow" target="_blank"><div class="altModelsWrap"><img class="altModelsImg" src="https://d2j6dbq0eux0bg.cloudfront.net/images/12492559/3122332937.jpg"><div class="altModelsName">Gloinsson</div><b>$15.99</b></div></a></div></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_contentKâhl"><p>The <span class="kwb">KÂHL</span> keyword is used in the following Leagues of Votann datasheets:</p><span class="contents"><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Characters</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO LVVS" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#K-hl" class="contentColor">Kâhl</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO LVVS" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Ûthar-the-Destined" class="contentColor">Ûthar the Destined</a></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div></span></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00140"><div class=" str10Wrap BreakInsideAvoid str10ColorEither"><div class="str10Name">BRËKKEKNOTS</div>
<div class="str10Border"><div class="str10DiamondWrap"><div><div class="str10Diamond"><div style="filter: invert(40%) sepia(12%) saturate(2210%) hue-rotate(121deg) brightness(94%) contrast(88%);" ;="" class="str10Shooting str10ColorEither"></div></div></div><div class="str10Pos2"><div class="str10Diamond"><div class="str10CP">1CP</div></div></div></div>
<div class="str10Type">Hearthband – Battle Tactic Stratagem</div>
<div class="str10Line"></div>
<div class="str10Legend ShowFluff">These micro shield generators, worked into warrior jewellery or armour crests, trigger on command to provide short-lived boosted protection.</div>
<div class="str10Line ShowFluff"></div>
<div class="str10Text"><span class="str10ColorEither"><b>WHEN:</b></span> Your opponent’s <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a> or the <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#FIGHT-PHASE">Fight phase</a>, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.<br><br><span class="str10ColorEither"><b>TARGET:</b></span> One <span class="tooltip00087" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00087" data-tooltip-anchor="#tooltip_content00087"><span class="kwb kwbu">KÂHL</span></span>, <a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Ûthar-the-Destined"><span class="kwb kwbo">ÛTHAR</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbo">THE</span> <span class="kwb kwbo">DESTINED</span></a> or <a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Einhyr-Hearthguard"><span class="kwb kwbo">EINHYR</span> <span class="kwb kwbo">HEARTHGUARD</span></a> unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.<br><br><span class="str10ColorEither"><b>EFFECT:</b></span> Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ <span class="tooltip00044" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00044"><span class="tt kwbu">invulnerable</span> <span class="tt kwbu">save</span></span>.</div>
<div class="str10Line"></div>
</div></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00141"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>Quake Multigenerator</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></span><span>15 pts</span></li></ul><div class="detachName">Hearthband Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">Extremely rare and costly to manufacture, this darkstar-powered coil enables a weapon to initiate tremendously powerful reverberations.</p><p><span class="tooltip00087" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00087" data-tooltip-anchor="#tooltip_content00087"><span class="kwb kwbu">KÂHL</span></span> model only. In your <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a>, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding <span class="kwb">TITANIC</span> units) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the <span class="tooltip00020" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00020"><span class="tt kwbu">Hit</span> <span class="tt kwbu">roll</span></span>.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00142"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>High Kâhl</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></span><span>30 pts</span></li></ul><div class="detachName">Hearthband Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">This warrior’s value is only too well known by their comrades. Those Kin sworn to defend them will fight to their last breath rather than fail in this duty.</p><p><span class="tooltip00087" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00087" data-tooltip-anchor="#tooltip_content00087"><span class="kwb kwbu">KÂHL</span></span> model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00143"><div class="tooltip_header">Objective Markers</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Objective-Markers"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
Objective markers represent objects of tactical or strategic import that both sides are attempting to secure, such as valuable artefacts, vital supplies or communications nodes. If a mission uses objective markers, it will state where they are located on the battlefield. These can be represented using any suitable marker, but we recommend using round markers that are 40mm in diameter.<br><br>When setting objective markers up on the battlefield, place them so they are centred on the point specified by the mission. When measuring distances to and from objective markers, measure to and from the closest part of them. Models can move over objective markers as if they were not there, but they cannot end a move on top of an objective marker.<br><br>At the start of the battle, each objective marker on the battlefield is said to be contested, and so is not controlled by either player. To control an objective marker, a player will first need to move models within range of it. A model is within range of an objective marker if it is within 3" horizontally and 5" vertically of that objective marker.<br><br>Every model has an Objective Control (OC) characteristic listed on its datasheet. To determine a player’s Level of Control over an objective marker, add together the OC characteristics of all the models from that player’s army that are within range of that objective marker. A player will control an objective marker at the end of any phase or turn if their Level of Control over it is greater than their opponent’s. If both players have the same Level of Control over an objective marker, that objective marker is contested.<br><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li>A model is within range of an objective marker if within 3" horizontally and 5" vertically.</li><li><b>Level of Control:</b> Add together the OC characteristics of all of a player’s models within range of the objective marker.</li><li>An objective marker is controlled by the player with the highest Level of Control over it (in a tie, it is contested).</li><li>Models cannot end a move on top of an objective marker.</li></ul></div>
</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00144"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>Tactical Alchemy</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-4"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></span><span>10 pts</span></li></ul><div class="detachName">Brandfast Oathband Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">The greatest kinhost commanders can transmute profitable yields into more immediate tactical and strategic support.</p><p><span class="tooltip00087" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00087" data-tooltip-anchor="#tooltip_content00087"><span class="kwb kwbu">KÂHL</span></span> model only. In your <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#COMMAND-PHASE">Command phase</a>, if the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more <span class="tooltip00143" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00143"><span class="tt kwbu">objective</span> <span class="tt kwbu">markers</span></span> you control that are not within your deployment zone, you can spend 1YP. If you do, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00145"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>Precursive Judgement</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-4"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></span><span>15 pts</span></li></ul><div class="detachName">Brandfast Oathband Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">This commander swiftly acts on alerts from trusted logic cores and unleashes deadly judgements before the kindred’s foes escape.</p><p><span class="tooltip00087" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00087" data-tooltip-anchor="#tooltip_content00087"><span class="kwb kwbu">KÂHL</span></span> model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within 6" of one or more friendly <span class="tooltip00090" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00090" data-tooltip-anchor="#tooltip_content00090"><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVLV"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVDS"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVBO"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVHA"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="" class="snFl LVHE"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVMO"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVVS"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVHS"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span> <span class="kwb kwbu">TRANSPORT</span></span> units, you can target the bearer’s unit with the <span class="tooltip00041" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00041"><span class="tt kwbu">Fire</span> <span class="tt kwbu">Overwatch</span></span> Stratagem for 0CP and hits are scored on unmodified <span class="tooltip00020" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00020"><span class="tt kwbu">Hit</span> <span class="tt kwbu">rolls</span></span> of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00146"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>Mercenary Prospector</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-6"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></span><span>20 pts</span></li></ul><div class="detachName">Mercenary Oathband Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">The most renowned military commanders of mercenary oathbands are swift to capitalise on the death and destruction of their foes. Each time an enemy unit is destroyed by the bearer’s unit, gain 2YP.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00147"><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><ul class="EnhancementsPts"><li><span>Mantle of Elders</span><span><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Enhancements-5"><div class="tooltip_link_inline"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div></span><span>10 pts</span></li></ul><div class="detachName">Hearthfyre Arsenal Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">The minds linked in this kognitaar mantle are believed to be the oldest of their kind. At the end of your turn, if the bearer is on the battlefield and you gained fewer than 3YP this turn, you gain an amount of YP equal to the difference.</p></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00149"><div class="tooltip_header">Assault</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Assault"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
<p class="ShowFluff legend2">Assault weapons fire so indiscriminately that they can be shot from the hip as warriors dash forward.</p>Weapons with <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[ASSAULT]</span> in their profile are known as Assault weapons. If a unit that <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Advance-Moves">Advanced</a> this turn contains any models equipped with Assault weapons, it is still eligible to shoot in this turn’s <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a>. When such a unit is selected to shoot, you can only resolve attacks using Assault weapons its models are equipped with.<br><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li>Can be shot even if the bearer’s unit Advanced.</li></ul></div>
</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00150"><div class="tooltip_header">Heavy</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Heavy"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
<p class="ShowFluff legend2">Heavy weapons are amongst the biggest guns on the battlefield, but require bracing to fire at full effect and are unwieldy to bring to bear at close quarters.</p>Weapons with <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[HEAVY]</span> in their profile are known as Heavy weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, if the attacking model’s unit <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Remain-Stationary">Remained Stationary</a> this turn, add 1 to that attack’s <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#1.-Hit-Roll">Hit roll</a>.<br><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li>Add 1 to Hit rolls if the bearer’s unit Remained Stationary this turn.</li></ul></div>
</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_contentGrenades"><p>The <span class="kwb">GRENADES</span> keyword is used in the following Leagues of Votann datasheets:</p><span class="contents"><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Battleline</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO LVVS" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Hearthkyn-Warriors" class="contentColor">Hearthkyn Warriors</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Other</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Hernkyn-Pioneers" class="contentColor">Hernkyn Pioneers</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO LVVS" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Hernkyn-Yaegirs" class="contentColor">Hernkyn Yaegirs</a></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div></span></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00152"><div class=" str10Wrap BreakInsideAvoid str10ColorYour"><div class="str10Name">GRENADE</div>

Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 <span class="tooltip00005" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00005"><span class="tt kwbu">mortal</span> <span class="tt kwbu">wound</span></span>.</div>

<div class="str10Border"><div class="str10DiamondWrap"><div><div class="str10Diamond"><div style="filter: invert(23%) sepia(88%) saturate(2002%) hue-rotate(179deg) brightness(87%) contrast(93%);" ;="" class="str10Shooting str10ColorYour"></div></div></div><div class="str10Pos2"><div class="str10Diamond"><div class="str10CP">1CP</div></div></div></div>
<div class="str10Type">Void Salvagers – Battle Tactic Stratagem</div>
<div class="str10Line"></div>
<div class="str10Legend ShowFluff">The Kin are well used to working in close confines and can fire their ranged weapons with precision even within the restrictive corridors of a voidship.</div>
<div class="str10Line ShowFluff"></div>
<div class="str10Text"><span class="str10ColorYour"><b>WHEN:</b></span> Your <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/boarding-action-rules/#Shooting-Phase">Shooting phase</a>.<br><br><span class="str10ColorYour"><b>TARGET:</b></span> One <a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Hearthkyn-Warriors"><span class="kwb kwbo">HEARTHKYN</span> <span class="kwb kwbo">WARRIORS</span></a> unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.<br><br><span class="str10ColorYour"><b>EFFECT:</b></span> Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the <span class="kwb2 bluefont"><span class="tooltip00126" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00126"><span class="tt kwbu">[PISTOL]</span></span></span> ability.</div>
<div class="str10Line"></div>
</div></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00155"><div class="Corner33 abWrap BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="abFlex"><div class="abDiamondWrap"><div class="abDiamond"><div class="abIcon"></div></div></div><div class="abLine"></div><div class="abNameWrap"><div class="abName">FIRING DECK</div></div></div><p style="padding-bottom:8px" class="ShowFluff stratLegend2">Some transports have firing hatches, ports or platforms from which embarked passengers can shoot.</p>Some <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> models have ‘Firing Deck x’ listed in their abilities. Each time such a model is selected to shoot in the <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a>, you can select up to ‘x’ models <span class="tooltip00070" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00070"><span class="tt kwbu">embarked</span></span> within it whose units have not already shot this phase. Then, for each of those embarked models, you can select one ranged weapon that embarked model is equipped with (excluding weapons with the <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[ONE SHOT]</span> ability). Until that <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> model has resolved all of its attacks, it counts as being equipped with all of the weapons you selected in this way, in addition to its other weapons. Until the end of the phase, those selected models’ units are not eligible to shoot.<br><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li><b>Firing Deck ‘x’:</b> Each time this <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> shoots, select one weapon (excluding weapons with the <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[ONE SHOT]</span> ability) from up to ‘x’ models embarked within it whose units have not shot this phase; this <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> counts as being equipped with those weapons as well. Until the end of the phase, those selected models’ units are not eligible to shoot.</li></ul></div></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00156"><div class="Corner33 abWrap BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="abFlex"><div class="abDiamondWrap"><div class="abDiamond"><div class="abIcon"></div></div></div><div class="abLine"></div><div class="abNameWrap"><div class="abName">SCOUTS</div></div></div><p style="padding-bottom:8px" class="ShowFluff stratLegend2">Scouts form the vanguard of many armies. Unnoticed by the enemy, they range ahead of the main force.</p>Some units have ‘Scouts x"’ listed in their abilities. If every model in a unit has this ability, then at the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, it can make a Normal move of up to x", with the exception that, while making that move, the distance moved by each model in that unit can be greater than that model's Move characteristic, as long as it is not greater than x".<br><br><span class="kwb">DEDICATED</span> <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> models can make use of any Scouts x" ability listed in their abilities, or a Scouts x" ability that a unit that starts the battle embarked within that <span class="kwb">DEDICATED</span> <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> model has (provided only models with this ability are embarked within that <span class="kwb">DEDICATED</span> <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> model), regardless of how that embarked unit gained this ability (e.g. listed in their abilities, conferred by an Enhancement or by an <span class="tooltip00018" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00018"><span class="tt kwbu">attached</span></span> <span class="kwb">CHARACTER</span>, etc.).<br><br>A unit that moves using this ability must end that move more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If both players have units that can do this, the player who is taking the first turn moves their units first.<br><br><div class="redExample"><b>Example:</b> A unit has the Scouts 6" ability. At the start of the first battle round, the controlling player can make a Normal move with that unit of up to 6".</div><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li><b>Scouts x":</b> Unit can make a Normal move of up to x" before the first turn begins.</li><li>If embarked in a <span class="kwb">DEDICATED</span> <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span>, that <span class="kwb">DEDICATED</span> <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> can make this move instead.</li><li>Must end this move more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.</li></ul></div></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00157"><div class="tooltip_header">Twin-linked</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Twin-linked"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
<p class="ShowFluff legend2">Dual weapons are often grafted to the same targeting system for greater lethality.</p>Weapons with <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[TWIN-LINKED]</span> in their profile are known as Twin-linked weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, you can re-roll that attack’s <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#2.-Wound-Roll">Wound roll</a>.
</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00158"><div class="tooltip_header">Transport Capacity</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Transport-Capacity"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
All <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> models have a transport capacity listed on their <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Datasheets-1">datasheet</a>. This determines the type and maximum number of friendly models that can <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Embark">embark</a> within them.<br><br>Units can start the battle embarked within a <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> model instead of being set up separately – declare which units are embarked within a <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> model before you set it up.<br><br><div class="Corner33 abWrap BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="abFlex"><div class="abDiamondWrap"><div class="abDiamond"><div class="abIcon"></div></div></div><div class="abLine"></div><div class="abNameWrap"><div class="abName">FIRING DECK</div></div></div><p style="padding-bottom:8px" class="ShowFluff stratLegend2">Some transports have firing hatches, ports or platforms from which embarked passengers can shoot.</p>Some <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> models have ‘Firing Deck x’ listed in their abilities. Each time such a model is selected to shoot in the <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a>, you can select up to ‘x’ models <span class="tooltip00070" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00070"><span class="tt kwbu">embarked</span></span> within it whose units have not already shot this phase. Then, for each of those embarked models, you can select one ranged weapon that embarked model is equipped with (excluding weapons with the <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[ONE SHOT]</span> ability). Until that <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> model has resolved all of its attacks, it counts as being equipped with all of the weapons you selected in this way, in addition to its other weapons. Until the end of the phase, those selected models’ units are not eligible to shoot.<br><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li><b>Firing Deck ‘x’:</b> Each time this <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> shoots, select one weapon (excluding weapons with the <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[ONE SHOT]</span> ability) from up to ‘x’ models embarked within it whose units have not shot this phase; this <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> counts as being equipped with those weapons as well. Until the end of the phase, those selected models’ units are not eligible to shoot.</li></ul></div></div>
</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_contentVehicle"><p>The <span class="kwb">VEHICLE</span> keyword is used in the following Leagues of Votann datasheets:</p><span class="contents"><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Dedicated Transports</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Carrier" class="contentColor">Kapricus Carrier</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Sagitaur" class="contentColor">Sagitaur</a></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Other</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Hekaton-Land-Fortress" class="contentColor">Hekaton Land Fortress</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Defenders" class="contentColor">Kapricus Defenders</a></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div></span></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00160"><div class="tooltip_header">Flying</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Flying"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
If a model can <span class="kwb">FLY</span>, then when it makes a <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Normal-Moves">Normal</a>, <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Advance-Moves">Advance</a> or <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Fall-Back-Moves">Fall Back move</a>, it can be moved over enemy models as if they were not there, and can be moved within <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Engagement-Range">Engagement Range</a> of enemy models when making such a move. Note this also means that <span class="kwb">MONSTER</span> and <span class="kwb">VEHICLE</span> models that can <span class="kwb">FLY</span> can be moved over other <span class="kwb">MONSTER</span> and <span class="kwb">VEHICLE</span> models when making such a move. However, models that can <span class="kwb">FLY</span> cannot end their move on top of any other models or within Engagement Range of any enemy models.<br><br>When a model that can <span class="kwb">FLY</span> starts or ends a move on a <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Terrain-Features-1">terrain feature</a>, instead of measuring the path it has moved across the battlefield, you instead measure its path ‘through the air’, as shown in the diagram below.<br><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li><span class="kwb">FLY</span> models can move over enemy models when they make a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.</li><li><span class="kwb">FLY</span> models that start or end a move on a terrain feature measure distance moved through the air when they make a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.</li></ul></div>
</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_contentFly"><p>The <span class="tooltip00160" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00160"><span class="kwb kwbu">FLY</span></span> keyword is used in the following Leagues of Votann datasheets:</p><span class="contents"><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Dedicated Transports</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Carrier" class="contentColor">Kapricus Carrier</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Other</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Hernkyn-Pioneers" class="contentColor">Hernkyn Pioneers</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Defenders" class="contentColor">Kapricus Defenders</a></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div></span></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_contentTransport"><p>The <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Transports"><span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span></a> keyword is used in the following Leagues of Votann datasheets:</p><span class="contents"><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Dedicated Transports</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Carrier" class="contentColor">Kapricus Carrier</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Sagitaur" class="contentColor">Sagitaur</a></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div></span></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_contentHernkyn"><p>The <span class="kwb">HERNKYN</span> keyword is used in the following Leagues of Votann datasheets:</p><span class="contents"><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Dedicated Transports</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Carrier" class="contentColor">Kapricus Carrier</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Dedicated Transports</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Carrier" class="contentColor">Kapricus Carrier</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div><div style="clear:both; margin-bottom:8px;"><div class="BatRole">Other</div><div class="BreakInsideAvoid"><div class="clFl LVLV LVHE LVNO LVPP LVDS LVBO LVHA LVMO" style="padding: 1px 10px 1px 15px;"><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Kapricus-Defenders" class="contentColor">Kapricus Defenders</a></div></div><div style="clear:both"></div></div></span></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00166"><div class=" str10Wrap BreakInsideAvoid str10ColorEither"><div class="str10Name">SECURE POSITIONS</div>
<div class="str10Border"><div class="str10DiamondWrap"><div><div class="str10Diamond"><div style="filter: invert(40%) sepia(12%) saturate(2210%) hue-rotate(121deg) brightness(94%) contrast(88%);" ;="" class="str10Any str10ColorEither"></div></div></div><div class="str10Pos2"><div class="str10Diamond"><div class="str10CP">1CP</div></div></div></div>
<div class="str10Type">Brandfast Oathband – Strategic Ploy Stratagem</div>
<div class="str10Line"></div>
<div class="str10Legend ShowFluff">While there are resources to secure, the Kin will seize any opportunity to effect a rapid and ordered deployment to establish defensive positions.</div>
<div class="str10Line ShowFluff"></div>
<div class="str10Text"><span class="str10ColorEither"><b>WHEN:</b></span> End of any of your phases, if units from your army have <span class="tooltip00008" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00008"><span class="tt kwbu">Hostile</span> <span class="tt kwbu">Acquisition</span></span>.<br><br><span class="str10ColorEither"><b>TARGET:</b></span> One <span class="tooltip00090" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00090" data-tooltip-anchor="#tooltip_content00090"><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVLV"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVPP"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb LVHA"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="" class="snFl LVHE"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span> unit embarked within your <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span> can <span class="tooltip00002" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00002"><span class="tt kwbu">disembark</span></span>. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of your <span class="kwb">TRANSPORT</span>. That unit cannot <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#CHARGE-PHASE">declare a charge</a> in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.</div>
<div class="str10Line"></div>
</div></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00167"><div class=" str10Wrap BreakInsideAvoid str10ColorYour"><div class="str10Name">ILLUMINATED PRIORITY</div>
<div class="str10Border"><div class="str10DiamondWrap"><div><div class="str10Diamond"><div style="filter: invert(23%) sepia(88%) saturate(2002%) hue-rotate(179deg) brightness(87%) contrast(93%);" ;="" class="str10Shooting str10ColorYour"></div></div></div><div class="str10Pos2"><div class="str10Diamond"><div class="str10CP">1CP</div></div></div></div>
<div class="str10Type">Brandfast Oathband – Wargear Stratagem</div>
<div class="str10Line"></div>
<div class="str10Legend ShowFluff">Using specialised beam emission signatures, multispectral ammunition, or broadcasting targeting data, the gunnery crews of Kin war engines can signify priority targets for their comrades.</div>
<div class="str10Line ShowFluff"></div>
<div class="str10Text"><span class="str10ColorYour"><b>WHEN:</b></span> Your <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a>, just after a <span class="tooltip00080" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00080" data-tooltip-anchor="#tooltip_content00080"><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVLV"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb kwbu">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVNO"><span class="kwb kwbu">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2 kwbu">OF</span> <span class="kwb unit from your army has shot.<br><br><span class="str10ColorYour"><b>TARGET:</b></span> That <span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVLV"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVNO"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVBO"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span class="kwb">VOTANN</span></span><span style="display:none;" class="snFl LVHS"><span class="kwb">LEAGUES</span> <span class="kwb2">OF</span> <span Until the end of the phase, each time a <span class="tooltip00009" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00009" data-tooltip-anchor="#tooltip_content00009"><span style="display:none;" class="snFl <div class="str10Line"></div>
</div></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00175"><div class="tooltip_header">Indirect Fire</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Indirect-Fire"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div>
<p class="ShowFluff legend2">Indirect fire weapons launch munitions over or around intervening obstacles – nowhere is safe from their fury.</p>Weapons with <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[INDIRECT FIRE]</span> in their profile are known as Indirect Fire weapons, and attacks can be made with them even if the target is not visible to the attacking model. These attacks can destroy enemy models in a target unit even though none may have been visible to the attacking unit when you selected that target.<br><br>If no models in a target unit are visible to the attacking unit when you select that target, then each time a model in the attacking unit makes an attack against that target using an Indirect Fire weapon, subtract 1 from that attack’s <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#1.-Hit-Roll">Hit roll</a>, an unmodified Hit roll of 1-3 always fails, and the target has the <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Benefit-of-Cover">Benefit of Cover</a> against that attack. Weapons with the <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[TORRENT]</span> ability cannot be fired using the <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[INDIRECT FIRE]</span> ability.<br><br><div class="redExample"><b>Example:</b> An enemy unit is targeted by an attacking model equipped with a weapon with the <span class="kwb2 bluefont">[INDIRECT FIRE]</span> ability. No models in the target unit are visible to the attacking model, so when resolving the attacks made with that weapon, subtract 1 from that attack’s Hit roll an unmodified Hit roll of 1-3 always fails, and each time an attack is allocated to a model in the target unit, it has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.</div><br><div class="BreakInsideAvoid frameLight Corner14" style=""><ul class="redSquare"><li>Can target and make attacks against units that are not visible to the attacking unit.</li><li>If no models are visible in a target unit when it is selected, then when making an attack against that target with an Indirect Fire weapon, subtract 1 from that attack’s Hit roll, an unmodified Hit roll of 1-3 always fails, and the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.</li></ul></div>

<div class="str10Line"></div>
</div></div></span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00179"><div class="tooltip_header">Fury From The Dêlve</div><a href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/#Fury-From-The-Dêlve"><div class="tooltip_link"></div></a><div style="clear:both"></div><div class="detachName">Dêlve Assault Shift Detachment</div><p class="ShowFluff legend2">Efficiency and practicality are ingrained in all Kin. Thus, the most meagre of Cthonian dêlves are well-equipped networks of passages, accessways and teleport nodes that enable a guild's bionically altered elites to appear where the foe least expects them. They emerge saturated with cyberstimulants and full of fury, ready to smash asunder those who dare trespass amongst their guild’s operations.</p><a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Cthonian-Beserks"><span class="kwb kwbo">CTHONIAN</span> <span class="kwb kwbo">BESERKS</span></a> units from your army have the <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#Normal-Moves">Deep Strike</a> ability.<br><br><span class="hi_custom">KEYWORDS</span><br><span class="kwb">CTHONIAN</span> <span class="kwb">BESERKS</span> units from your army gain the <span class="kwb">BATTLELINE</span> keyword.</span></div><div class="tooltip_templates"><span id="tooltip_content00180"><div class=" str10Wrap BreakInsideAvoid str10ColorYour"><div class="str10Name">TECTONIC FRACTURE</div>
<div class="str10Border"><div class="str10DiamondWrap"><div><div class="str10Diamond"><div style="filter: invert(23%) sepia(88%) saturate(2002%) hue-rotate(179deg) brightness(87%) contrast(93%);" ;="" class="str10Shooting str10ColorYour"></div></div></div><div class="str10Pos2"><div class="str10Diamond"><div class="str10CP">1CP</div></div></div></div>
<div class="str10Type">Dêlve Assault Shift – Strategic Ploy Stratagem</div>
<div class="str10Line"></div>
<div class="str10Legend ShowFluff">Skilled Cthonian gunners can initiate localised quakes and pressure waves of such intensity that foes struggle to retain their impetus.</div>
<div class="str10Line ShowFluff"></div>
<div class="str10Text"><span class="str10ColorYour"><b>WHEN:</b></span> Your <a href="/wh40k10ed/the-rules/core-rules/#SHOOTING-PHASE">Shooting phase</a>, just after a <span class="kwb">CTHONIAN</span> <span class="kwb">EARTHSHAKERS</span> unit from your army has shot.<br><br><span class="str10ColorYour"><b>TARGET:</b></span> That <a class="kwbOne" href="/wh40k10ed/factions/leagues-of-votann/datasheets.html#Cthonian-Earthshakers"><span class="kwb kwbo">CTHONIAN</span> <span class="kwb kwbo">EARTHSHAKERS</span></a> unit.<br><br><span class="str10ColorYour"><b>EFFECT:</b></span> Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of your unit’s attacks this phase. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and, if you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, subtract 2 from <span class="tooltip00024" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00024"><span class="tt kwbu">Charge</span> <span class="tt kwbu">rolls</span></span> made for that unit.</div>
<div class="str10Line"></div>

If you spend 1YP, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the <span class="kwb2 bluefont"><span class="tooltip00012" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_content00012"><span class="tt kwbu">[SUSTAINED</span> <span class="tt kwbu">HITS</span> <span class="tt kwbu">1]</span></span></span> ability as well.</div>

<div class="tooltipArmyList tooltipstered" data-tooltip-content="#tooltip_contentArmyListCollated" id="btnArmyList"></div>
<script type="text/javascript">
$(window).scroll(function() {
if ($(this).scrollTop() >= 200) {
$('#btnBackToTop').fadeIn(300); 
} else {
$('#btnBackToTop').fadeOut(300); 
}
});

$('#btnBackToTop').on('touchstart', function () {
	'use strict';
	$(this).attr('style', 'background-image: url(/wh40k10ed/img/Button_ToTop_Hover.png); background-image: var(--button-to-top-hover)');
	$(this).fadeIn(300);
	return true;
